creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, 

I will be closing this PR, not because the information you provided is bad, but 
because you should first obtain information via the freebsd-hackers and/or 
other freebsd- mailinglists, a problem can only exist after research etc and 
not directly. (The PR db is not a helpchannel) 

If after research people think that there is a real problem, please notify 
me and we will reopen it and add the proper information to the PR ticket.
